author: jingmengzhiyue
description: Collect, organize, format, search, and explain code snippets in Markdown. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: meng king
manifest.description: Collect, organize, search, copy, and insert code snippets in Markdown.
manifest.name: code-snippet-manager

name: code-snippet-manager

releases.author: jingmengzhiyue
releases.description:
Formal 1.0.0 release for Obsidian.

Highlights:
- Simplified Markdown snippet format.
- Removed formatter and AI actions from the current release.
- Added dashboard-based snippet creation.
- Grouped dashboard results by Markdown collection file.
- Added compact Obsidian code tags such as #code/sql/oracle11g.
- Added fuzzy tag filtering without typing #.

Release assets for Obsidian:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: jingmengzhiyue
releases.description:
Release 0.1.2 fixes the Obsidian community review failure caused by _0x... matches in bundled release assets.

Changes:
- Build release assets without minification so main.js remains readable for review.
- Use Prettier's babel-ts parser instead of bundling prettier/plugins/typescript, removing TypeScript diagnostic strings that matched _0x... patterns.
- Bump manifest/package/versions metadata to 0.1.2.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: jingmengzhiyue
releases.description:
Release 0.1.1

Community review fixes:
- Add explicit privacy, network, AI provider, API key, and vault file-access disclosures to README.
- Replace background Markdown writes with Obsidian Vault.process.
- Set authorUrl to the author's GitHub profile.
- Update package, manifest, versions, and release assets to 0.1.1.

Assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: jingmengzhiyue
releases.description:
Release 0.1.0

Changes:
- Rename plugin id, display name, package name, README, styles, and source identifiers to code-snippet-manager.
- Keep Markdown-backed snippet management, search, formatter, and AI explanation MVP behavior.

Assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css
